title: Plans 2a + 2b — authoritative engine + browser game client
description:
## Summary

- **Plan 2a (arena-engine):** Full authoritative game server — AABB physics, hitscan weapons, shrinking zone, item/powerup cycles, A\* bot AI, 30 Hz tick loop, WebSocket message routing
- **Plan 2b (arena-game-client):** Browser game client — React 18 + Pixi.js v8 renderer, LobbyScene (character picker + roster), MatchScene (canvas + HUD overlay), ResultsScene (place table + rematch vote), ArenaIsland socket lifecycle; arena-server pinned to Hetzner nodes for DNS reliability
- Tests: FA-38 Playwright E2E (lobby → match → results), FA-39 shell smoke (schema + auth gate), diff.ts unit tests 9/9

## Test Plan
- [ ] `task workspace:validate` passes
- [ ] `npx vitest run src/components/arena/game/diff.test.ts` → 9/9 pass
- [ ] `curl -s https://arena-ws.mentolder.de/healthz` → `{"ok":true,...}`
- [ ] Admin opens lobby at `web.mentolder.de/admin/arena` → character picker works → bots fill → match starts → results shown
- [ ] Recent matches table populates after match completes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
